summary: Dashboard fails brand palette consistency and mobile spec compliance. Uses neutral gray UI instead of required diner palette, contradicting product manifesto requirements for authenticated surfaces.

violations.description: Dashboard uses neutral gray/white UI surfaces instead of diner palette. Background appears white/gray rather than required cream (#fff8ea) or teal (#9fd8d2) from brand system.
Authenticated dashboard uses neutral gray UI defaults instead of diner palette surfaces. Should use cream (#fff8ea) or appropriate diner palette colors, not generic UI grays.
Logged-in app chrome has bled into neutral palette system instead of maintaining visual separation from public marketing palette as required.

actions: Apply diner palette to dashboard background and card surfaces using cream (#fff8ea) or appropriate brand colors
Ensure authenticated UI maintains brand consistency with public marketing surfaces per postmortem rule P.brand_palette_consistency
Verify mobile drawer navigation remains functional at 390px viewport as specified
Replace neutral gray UI elements with diner palette equivalents from manifesto
